# Svensk Databas

> A database showing where Swedish brands actually manufacture their products.

Svensk Databas is an independent transparency project by Maximilian that helps consumers understand where Swedish brands truly produce their goods. Brands are categorized as **Yes**, **Partially**, or **No** based on whether production takes place in Sweden.

The database covers 90+ brands across categories including clothing, furniture, electronics, food and beverages, vehicles, and jewelry. Data is sourced from annual reports, allabolag.se, the Swedish Companies Registration Office (Bolagsverket), and company websites.

## Pages

- [The Database](https://brandsfrom.se/): Searchable and sortable database of all brands -- filter by name, category, or manufacturing status.
- [About the project](https://brandsfrom.se/om): Explains the status definitions (Yes/Partially/No), the project's purpose and limitations, and how to report inaccuracies.

## Status definitions

- **Yes (Ja)** -- all or essentially all production takes place in Sweden (requires positive evidence: label, factory address, explicit claim)
- **Partially (Delvis)** -- some production in Sweden, some abroad (e.g. design and assembly in Sweden, sewing abroad)
- **No (Nej)** -- production abroad, even if the brand is Swedish-owned and/or designed in Sweden

## Optional

- [Full content](https://brandsfrom.se/llms-full.txt): Complete inline version of all site content, no external links required.

## Technical

Data source: Sanity CMS. No sponsored or paid content. No personal data collected.
Contact: maximilian.relam@gmail.com
